name: Drill Armed Dragon
name_jp: ドリル・アームド・ドラゴン
desc: You can send this card and 1 other WIND monster from your hand to the GY; for the rest of this turn, all WIND Dragon monsters you control gain 300 ATK. You can banish any number of Dragon monsters that are Level 7 or higher and/or WIND from your GY; add 1 Dragon monster from your Deck to your hand with a Level equal to the number banished, except "Drill Armed Dragon". You can only use each effect of "Drill Armed Dragon" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can send this card and 1 other WIND monster from your hand to the GY; for the rest of this turn, all WIND Dragon monsters you control gain 300 ATK. You can banish any number of Dragon monsters that are Level 7 or higher and/or WIND from your GY; add 1 Dragon monster from your Deck to your hand with a Level equal to the number banished, except "Drill Armed Dragon". You can only use each effect of "Drill Armed Dragon" once per turn.

You can banish any number of Dragon monsters that are Level 7 or higher and/or WIND from your GY; add 1 Dragon monster from your Deck to your hand with a Level equal to the number banished, except "Drill Armed Dragon". You can only use each effect of "Drill Armed Dragon" once per turn.

action: Sends itself from hand to Graveyard for cost
